zh.lifeSummary: 當Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain於1218年出生在法國時，他的父親Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain58歲，母親Indie de Toulouse26歲。他於1229年與Emme d 'Avenel結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈可姆享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain于1218年出生在法国时，他的父亲Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain58岁，母亲Indie de Toulouse26岁。他于1229年与Emme d 'Avenel结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈可姆享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: L'isle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Jourdain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Henri, Pierre, Fritz, Hans, Jacques, Rommel.
French, Breton (mainly Finistère), and West Indian (mainly Haiti, also Martinique and Dominican Republic): from the French personal name Jourdain, an equivalent of Jordan .
English (London, Derbyshire): French-influenced variant of   Jordan  ; compare 1 above.

variants.name: Jourden
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaile, Ghislaine.
Breton and French: variant of   Jourdain   ‘Jordan’.
Altered form, under French influence (compare 1 above), of English   Jordan  .

variants.name: Jordan
meanings: English, German, French (mainly Alsace and Haute-Savoie), Polish, Czech, and Slovenian; Spanish and Hungarian (Jordán): from the Christian personal name or nickname Jordan. This is taken from the name of the river Jordan (Hebrew Yarden, a derivative of yarad ‘to go down’, i.e. to the Dead Sea). At the time of the Crusades it was a common practice for crusaders and pilgrims to bring back flasks of water from the river in which John the Baptist had baptized people, including Christ himself, and to use it in the christening of their own children. As a result Jordan became quite a common personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Jourdain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain was born in 1218, in France, his father, Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain, was 58 and his mother, Indie de Toulouse, was 26. He married Emme d 'Avenel in 1229. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1289, in Chaffcombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain est né en 1218, à France, son père, Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Indie de Toulouse, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Emme d 'Avenel en 1229. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1289, à Chaffcombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain 1218 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain 58 und seine Mutter Indie de Toulouse 26. Er hat 1229 Emme d 'Avenel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1289 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Chaffcombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain è nato il nel 1218 nel Francia, il suo padre, Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Indie de Toulouse, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Emme d 'Avenel nel 1229. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1289, nel Chaffcombe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jourdain de L'isle Jourdainが1218年にフランスで生まれた時，父Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdainは58歳，母Indie de Toulouseは26歳であった。1229年にEmme d 'Avenelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャフコンベで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain(이)가 1218년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Indie de Toulouse(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1229년 Emme d 'Avenel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 차프코브에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain nasceu em 1218, em França, seu pai, Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Indie de Toulouse, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Emme d 'Avenel em 1229. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1289, em Chaffcombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain родился в 1218 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Indie de Toulouse, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Emme d 'Avenel в 1229 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности чаффкомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jourdain de L'isle Jourdain nació en 1218, en Francia, su papá, Bernard-Jourdain de l’Isle-Jourdain, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Indie de Toulouse, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Emme d 'Avenel en 1229. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1289, en Chaffcombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
